purpose: Repository-local allowlist that limits future monitoring scope to the IPC index for educational and technical market intelligence work.

assets.notes: IPC observations are index points; MXN records the Mexican market context for the watchlist entry.

traceability.source_reference: BMV and S&P Dow Jones Indices public IPC index reference materials; no market values captured.
traceability.review_rationale: Included as the first governed Mexican market index scope for future ingestion planning.
